case_title: W.J. BRITTON & CO. VS. GEORGE PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF W.J. BRITTON & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, GEORGE PEREZ, OMAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 124 TIFFANY AVENUE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78496492)
DECLARATION OF JOHN BRITTON RE: FAIR RENTAL VALUE AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL LEASE IN THE AMOUNT OF $80.00. (TRANSACTION ID # 78496492) FILED BY PLAINTIFF W.J. BRITTON & CO.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF W.J. BRITTON & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, GEORGE PEREZ, OMAR DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78496492), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF W.J. BRITTON & CO. SERVED JAN-20-2026, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
